Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Nancy Dussault sings, while Mr. Tudball finds himself regretting his offer to pay for a funeral.
Video.title: Nancy Dussault

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features "Carol & Sis", where hypochondriac Harvey must avoid an ailing Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Kenneth Mars & John Byner star! Includes Carol as a soap opera fanatic, Kenneth's coaching, and dreams.
Video.title: Kenneth Mars, John Byner

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones drop in to join in the fun!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Includes mother Carol offering daughter Vicki some advice on the way to the altar, and Tim as a handyman.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Ruth Buzzi guest, with Buzzi as Chris' friend in "Carol & Sis", and Tim and Carol as survivors.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ruth Buzzi

Video.summary: Guest star Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family" in this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joanne Woodward

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray join the gang for a series of Carol's patented commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Don Rickles guests as a house painter on this "Carol & Sis" sketch. Harvey and Carol face a home invasion.
Video.title: Don Rickles

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Guests Ronnie Schell and Vicki Carr take to the stage with stand-up and song (respectively)!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ronnie Schell, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Phil Silvers & Jean Stapleton guest! Features "The Old Folks", commercial parodies, and a musical number.
Video.title: Phil Silvers, Jean Stapleton

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Totie Fields take part in Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays The Oldest Galley Slave, an ad exec visiting an actress, and a lawyer who is a rabbit.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone appear in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: Carol plays an actress with the flu.
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Alan King stars as a psychiatrist. Also: Carol tries making breakfast; a nurse & patient recognize each other.
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Dom DeLuise is Carol's guest for a night of sketched, including a murder investigation and "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars! Includes Roddy joining "The Family" for a reunion, and a "Brief Encounter."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join for sketch set in the days of vaudeville, "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Don Rickles and Nanette Fabray guest star. Fabray and Carol are expectant mothers, and Rickles is a salesman.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Don Rickles

Video.summary: John Byner & Francine Beers star! Includes a convict seeking refuge, Carol & Vicki as robots, & "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest, featuring a toy ad and a court sketch. It's poker night on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
